overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Far Cry 6) showing a walk through a tropical town square. The player moves from a vine-covered monument, along streets with colorful colonial buildings, toward a historic church with a bell tower, ending at a food vendor stall in the plaza.

events.description: camera stops circling monument and proceeds linearly along sidewalk
small utility truck drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking around the ivy-covered monument then proceeding along the sidewalk toward the street

notable_agents.action: small utility truck driving along the street past the camera

entered.detail: tall stone monument covered in green vines with carved details
wooden and stone benches arranged around the monument area
red and white chevron sign indicating a curve in the road
single-story green colonial-style building with red roof
two-story pink residential building with white trim
large rocky outcrop or mountain visible behind buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close view of an ivy-covered stone monument in a shaded town square. The camera circles the monument then moves along a sidewalk, passing stone benches and approaching a street where a small utility truck drives by. Colorful colonial buildings and a rocky hill are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with view of church

events.description: historic church with bell tower becomes visible in the distance as camera rounds the corner
approaching the main plaza, palm trees become prominent in the foreground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street toward the town center and church

entered.detail: large stone church with tall bell tower and red dome roof
tall tropical palm trees lining the street
metal fence enclosing a lot next to the road
overhead electrical wires crossing the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit residential street with colorful colonial houses. The historic church with its distinctive bell tower gradually becomes visible in the distance. Palm trees and overhead power lines frame the view as the camera approaches the town center plaza.

events.description: transitioning from street into the open church plaza with cobblestone pavement
camera tilts upward to view the church tower then continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward the church, looking up at the bell tower architecture

notable_agents.action: person walking near the church entrance steps

entered.detail: ornate cobblestone and tile pavement of the town square
tall stone tower with arched openings and clock face
wide steps leading up to the church entrance
white metal benches arranged around the plaza

segments.scene_description: Entering the open church plaza with ornate cobblestone paving. The historic church dominates the view, framed by tall palm trees. The camera approaches the wide stone stairs leading to the church entrance while a few pedestrians are visible near the building. The plaza features white benches and a flagpole.

events.description: camera turns left toward the food vendor stall while approaching the church front
approaching close to the food vendor setup with cooking equipment visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the church steps then turning toward a food vendor stall in the plaza

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind metal cart with hands on hips
pig walking near the stairs in the plaza background

entered.detail: metal food cart with cooking surface and various supplies
grills and pots on the vendor cart with propane tanks
two-story yellow colonial building with balcony
tall white flagpole in front of the church

segments.scene_description: Moving through the plaza toward the front of the church, then turning left to approach a food vendor stall. The vendor stands behind a metal cart with cooking equipment and propane tanks. A pig wanders in the background near the church stairs, and a yellow colonial building is visible behind the vendor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shaded town monument through sunlit colonial streets and into a bustling church plaza. It begins by circling an ivy-covered stone monument in the shade before moving along a sidewalk past stone benches and a passing utility truck. As the camera transitions onto a bright residential street, colorful colonial houses and palm trees frame the view while a historic church bell tower gradually emerges in the distance. The scene then opens into a wide cobblestone plaza dominated by the church and its stone stairs, passing white benches and a flagpole under the open sky. Finally, the camera turns away from the church entrance to approach a food vendor at a metal cart, with a wandering pig and a yellow colonial building visible in the background.
